rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to April 1, 2020 to be heard with other pending motion(s). =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Wilmington Trust, National Association As Trustee Of The Mfra Trust 2014-2 And Fay Servicing Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF JULIANA CLEGG Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Wilmington Trust, National Association As Trustee Of The Mfra Trust 2014-2 And Fay Servicing Llc is continued to April 1, 2020 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a curtesy copies of filings made on March 6, 2020 and March 11, 2020. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than March 20, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA NGUYEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: 4160-64 25TH STREET, LLC VS. PAUL MADGWICK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT PAUL MADGWICK, GLEN STROUD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT NEFTALI LEDESMA, LILIANA EHUAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP VS. VENNETTA J. COFFMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT VENNETTA COFFMAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurer. No opposition filed. An amended complaint shall be filed within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to prepare order. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: 260 SAN MARCO PARTNERS LLC VS. JOSHUA LLOYD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Deft'S Admissions Admitted, To Compel Other Discovery Responses And Production Of Docs, And For Sanctions Against Deft Joshua Lloyd
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 13, 2020 line 7. PLAINTIFF 260 SAN MARCOS PARTNERS LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Deft'S Admissions Admitted, To Compel Other Discovery Responses And Production Of Docs, And For Sanctions Against Deft Joshua Lloyd is GRANTED. Admission are deemed admitted. Defendant to provide complete verified responses to Request for Production, From Interrogators and Special Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,100 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/SKF)
